title: Curse of the Shadow Dragon
author: Tracey West
desc: A cursed Shadow Dragon is blanketing the sky — can the Dragon Masters find a way to stop him? 🌑

q.en: What strange thing is creeping across the sky at the start of the book?
q.zh: 故事开头，有什么奇怪的东西在天空中蔓延？

explain.en: A strange black shadow is creeping across the bright blue sky, and Worm says something bad is coming.
explain.zh: 一片奇怪的黑影正在湛蓝的天空中蔓延，沃姆说有坏事要发生了。

q.en: Who arrives from the Land of Gallia to ask King Roland for help?
q.zh: 谁从伽利亚王国赶来向罗兰国王求助？

explain.en: Jean, Dragon Master of the Silver Dragon Argent, flies in and asks for help because the shadow is covering her kingdom too.
explain.zh: 银龙阿尔真特的驯龙师吉恩飞来求救，因为黑影也笼罩了她的王国。

q.en: Why does Griffith's gazing ball keep failing (showing yarn, a bubble, a wooden ball)?
q.zh: 为什么格里菲斯的窥镜一直失灵（变出毛线、肥皂泡、木球）？

options.en: The Shadow Dragon is draining wizard magic all over the world
options.zh: 暗影龙正在吸走全世界的巫师魔法

options.en: He simply forgot the spell according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 他只是忘了咒语（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Griffith realizes his magic is not working and that the Shadow Dragon is somehow affecting all wizard magic.
explain.zh: 格里菲斯意识到自己的魔法失灵了，而暗影龙正在影响全世界巫师的魔法。

q.en: What are the names of the Shadow Dragon and his Dragon Master?
q.zh: 暗影龙和它的驯龙师分别叫什么名字？

explain.en: In his gazing ball Griffith sees Chaya the Shadow Dragon and his eight-year-old Dragon Master, Aruna, whose eyes glow red.
explain.zh: 格里菲斯在窥镜里看到暗影龙查亚和它八岁的驯龙师阿鲁娜，两人的眼睛都闪着红光。

q.en: Why did Aruna feed the Balam seed to Chaya?
q.zh: 阿鲁娜为什么把巴拉姆种子喂给查亚？

options.en: She wanted to make him strong on purpose according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 她故意想让它变强（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: To stop her wizard Vanad from eating it and turning evil
options.zh: 为了阻止她的巫师瓦纳德吃下种子而变坏

explain.en: Aruna grabbed the seed first so Vanad could not eat it, believing the seed's power would not work on dragons.
explain.zh: 阿鲁娜抢先抓走了种子，不让瓦纳德吃下，她以为种子的力量对龙不起作用。

q.en: How often does the Balam flower produce one seed?
q.zh: 巴拉姆花每隔多久才会结出一粒种子？

options.en: Every 100 years according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 每100年（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Vanad explains that every thousand years the special flower produces exactly one seed.
explain.zh: 瓦纳德解释说，这种特别的花每过一千年才会结出一粒种子。

q.en: How do Drake and Jean escape from the Shadow Realm?
q.zh: 德雷克和吉恩是如何逃出暗影界的？

options.en: Drake uses his silver sword to make a portal
options.zh: 德雷克用银剑制造了一道传送门

options.en: Worm transports them out according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 沃姆把他们传送出去（按书中另一种说法）
他们骑着阿尔真特飞出去

explain.en: Worm cannot transport out of the magical space, so Drake uses the magic silver sword Jean gave him to create a portal.
explain.zh: 沃姆无法把这个魔法空间传送出去，于是德雷克用吉恩送他的魔法银剑制造了一道传送门。

q.en: What happens to Jean's hand after a shadow phantom touches it?
q.zh: 暗影幽灵碰到吉恩的手后，发生了什么？

explain.en: Griffith examines Jean's right hand and finds the phantom's touch has turned it into a shadow.
explain.zh: 格里菲斯检查吉恩的右手，发现被幽灵碰过的地方已经变成了影子。

q.en: Who heals Jean's shadow hand, and how?
q.zh: 是谁、用什么方法治好了吉恩的影子手？

options.en: Bo's Water Dragon Shu with healing mist
options.zh: 博的水龙舒用治愈薄雾

options.en: Worm with green light according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 沃姆用绿光（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Bo's Water Dragon Shu breathes a blue healing mist that washes away the shadow phantom's spell.
explain.zh: 博的水龙舒吐出蓝色的治愈薄雾，洗去了暗影幽灵的咒语。

q.en: What do Rori and Ana learn is needed to summon a Star Dragon?
q.zh: 罗瑞和安娜得知，召唤星龙需要什么？

explain.en: They read in a book that a Light Dragon is needed to summon a Star Dragon from the sky, and one can be found on the Picland Islands.
explain.zh: 她们从书里读到，召唤天上的星龙需要一条光龙，而皮克兰群岛上就有一条。
